name: BRISTOL MYERS SQUIBB CO
business: We operate in a single segment engaged in the discovery, development, licensing, manufacturing, marketing, distribution and sale of innovative medicines that help patients prevail over serious diseases. Our products are sold worldwide, principally to wholesalers, distributors, specialty pharmacies, and to a lesser extent, retailers, hospitals, clinics, government agencies and directly to patients.

exposures.sentence: Our platforms are comprised of chemically-synthesized or small molecule drugs including protein degraders, drugs produced from biological processes, called biologics, ADCs, CAR-T cell therapies, and radiopharmaceutical therapeutics.
We have a broad pipeline with over 45 unique assets in development.

catalysts.event: Open new state-of-the-art R&D facility in San Diego, California
catalysts.sentence: we are planning to open a new state of the art R&D facility in San Diego, California during 2026

catalysts.event: Provide Eliquis for free to the Medicaid program
catalysts.sentence: provide Eliquis for free to the Medicaid program effective January 1, 2026
